summary: Control Room (Admin Revenue & Pipeline Intelligence Dashboard) feature fully tested. Backend API (8/8 tests passed) and frontend UI (all components verified). All 5 metric cards, Monthly GMV Trend chart, and Top 10 Venues table working correctly. Admin-only access control verified.

issues: React hydration warning: 'tr cannot be a child of span' - cosmetic warning from Emergent wrapper, does not affect functionality
Console warning about chart width/height during initial render - resolves after page load, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Control Room API correctly requires admin role (403 for non-admin)
All 5 metric calculations working correctly (Pipeline Value, Confirmed GMV, BMV Commission, Active Holds, Payment Conversion)
Monthly GMV trend correctly shows 6 months of historical data
Top venues aggregation by commission working (empty state handled gracefully)
Navigation link visible in admin sidebar with Activity icon
Recharts integration rendering correctly with proper Y-axis formatting for Indian currency
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing data: 15 active leads, ₹40L pipeline value, ₹93K commission, 6 confirmed bookings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Control Room feature fully verified. Located at /admin/control-room. API endpoint: GET /api/admin/control-room. Key UI elements: data-testid='metric-pipeline', 'metric-gmv', 'metric-commission', 'metric-holds', 'metric-conversion', 'gmv-chart', 'top-venues-table'. Navigation link: data-testid='nav-control-room'. Admin-only access - RM users redirected to home page.

backend_control_room_api.metrics structure: PASS - All 8 required fields present (total_pipeline_value, confirmed_gmv_current_month, confirmed_bookings_current_month, bmv_commission_current_month, total_collected_current_month, active_tentative_holds, payment_conversion_rate, total_active_leads)
backend_control_room_api.monthly_gmv_trend structure: PASS - 6 months with month, month_full, gmv, bookings, commission fields
backend_control_room_api.top_venues_by_commission structure: PASS - venue_id, venue_name, city, tier, total_revenue, total_commission, payment_count

frontend_control_room_page.navigation_link: PASS - Control Room link visible in admin sidebar
frontend_control_room_page.heading: PASS - 'Revenue & Pipeline Intelligence' title displayed

frontend_metric_cards.confirmed_gmv: PASS - Shows ₹40.0L with 6 bookings this month

frontend_gmv_chart.months_displayed: PASS - Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec, Jan, Feb (6 months)
frontend_gmv_chart.legend: PASS - GMV and Commission legend visible

frontend_top_venues_table.empty_state: PASS - 'No commission data yet' message shown gracefully

access_control.rm_sidebar: PASS - Control Room link NOT visible to RM
access_control.rm_direct_access: PASS - RM redirected to home when accessing /admin/control-room directly
